name: image_ernie
description: Baidu's ERNIE-Image — 8B Diffusion Transformer (Apache-2.0) with strong instruction following and precise text rendering. Runs the ministral-3-3b CLIP encoder + flux2-vae alongside the bundled ernie-image-prompt-enhancer for built-in prompt rewriting. 20 euler steps, cfg 4. Heavy: ~24 GB VRAM.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate. The workflow's built-in ERNIE prompt-enhancer rewrites short prompts before encoding, so terse inputs work well.
